_doc: Per-(surface, theme) axe baseline for serious+critical WCAG 2.0/2.1 A/AA violations at the desktop-1440 capture in canonical-screenshots.spec.ts. Keys match the slug__theme convention used for screenshot filenames. The test passes when current violation count is <= baseline. Captured 2026-05-19 from a clean run; the mix is mostly color-contrast on text + a handful of aria-prohibited-attr nodes. Ratchet down via PRs that fix specific surfaces — drop the surface's baseline to the new count in the same PR. Missing keys default to 0 (any violation fails).
